title: Destruction Difficulty
description: Increase the difficulty of breaking blocks.
body:
# Destruction Difficulty
This Mod may make mining exceptionally challenging for players. For instance, breaking blocks might not yield items, and the speed of block destruction can be slowed down – it all depends on the player's preferences!

## 🧭 About This Mod
This Mod offers a high degree of freedom, allowing players to customize various values according to their preferences. It adds a touch of difficulty to Minecraft, making the game more challenging!

### Mod Description:
Most of the content within the Mod comes from the author's peculiar inspiration, and any resemblance is purely coincidental.   
Because my English is not very good, I used ChatGPT to generate the English language file for this Mod.  
You can add this Mod to your modpack without notifying the author.

### Mod Features:
* When a player uses a regular tool or one with the Silk Touch or Fortune enchantment to break a block, the block's chance to drop items is determined by different probabilities.
* Provides a block whitelist, allowing players to customize which blocks are not affected by the probability drop.
* Offers the flexibility to decrease the time it takes to mine blocks, with potential for further refinement of this feature.
* There is a chance that the player will consume food saturation after breaking a block.
